══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hexblood — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hexblood — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Hexblood — Unarmored Caster HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 53/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 53/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Hexblood — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 53/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hexblood — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hexblood — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 23 damage. Hexblood — Unarmored Caster HP: 30/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Hexblood — Unarmored Caster HP: 15/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Hexblood — Unarmored Caster HP: -2/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
